languages.text: Жертва Ведки Дунавски не осталась незамеченной для людей с ее родного мира. В историю Ведка вошла как святая мученица, отдавшая свою жизнь за 32-ой полк и Вольного Торговца, и ее пример многие десятилетия вдохновлял молодых бойцов на самоотверженную службу.

Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.
languages.original_text: Жертва Ведки Дунавски не осталась незамеченной для людей с ее родного мира. В историю Ведка вошла как святая мученица, отдавшая свою жизнь за 32-ой полк и Вольного Торговца, и ее пример многие десятилетия вдохновлял молодых бойцов на самоотверженную службу.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

languages.text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキの犠牲は、彼女の故郷の人々に忘れられなかった。ヴェドカは、32番目のメローヴ連隊とローグ・トレーダーのために命を捧げた聖なる殉教者として記憶された。そして、数十年後も、彼女の例は若い兵士たちに、無私無欲な奉仕の道を歩むよう勇気を与えた。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: ヴェドカ・ドゥナウスキの犠牲は、彼女の故郷の人々に忘れられなかった。ヴェドカは、32番目のメローヴ連隊とローグ・トレーダーのために命を捧げた聖なる殉教者として記憶された。そして、数十年後も、彼女の例は若い兵士たちに、無私無欲な奉仕の道を歩むよう勇気を与えた。

languages.text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡的牺牲被母星的人民铭记于心。人们缅怀她，将她视作献身于梅罗夫第32团与行商浪人的神圣殉道者。此后数十年，她的事迹激励着一代代年轻士兵，去追随她无私奉献的脚步。
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: 薇德卡·杜纳芙斯卡的牺牲被母星的人民铭记于心。人们缅怀她，将她视作献身于梅罗夫第32团与行商浪人的神圣殉道者。此后数十年，她的事迹激励着一代代年轻士兵，去追随她无私奉献的脚步。

languages.text: Le sacrifice de Vedka Dunawski ne passa pas inaperçu auprès des habitants de son monde. Elle resta dans les mémoires comme une sainte martyre qui avait donné sa vie pour le 32e régiment de Merov et {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. Par la suite, son service marqué par l'abnégation inspira de jeunes soldats à suivre son exemple.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: Le sacrifice de Vedka Dunawski ne passa pas inaperçu auprès des habitants de son monde. Elle resta dans les mémoires comme une sainte martyre qui avait donné sa vie pour le 32e régiment de Merov et {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}. Par la suite, son service marqué par l'abnégation inspira de jeunes soldats à suivre son exemple.

languages.text: El sacrificio de Vedka Dunawski no pasó desapercibido para los habitantes de su mundo. Vedka se recordó como una santa mártir que entregó su vida por el 32.º regimiento de Merov y {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente. Durante las décadas posteriores, su ejemplo inspiró a los jóvenes soldados a seguir sus pasos con un servicio abnegado.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: El sacrificio de Vedka Dunawski no pasó desapercibido para los habitantes de su mundo. Vedka se recordó como una santa mártir que entregó su vida por el 32.º regimiento de Merov y {mf|el|la} Comerciante Independiente. Durante las décadas posteriores, su ejemplo inspiró a los jóvenes soldados a seguir sus pasos con un servicio abnegado.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawski'nin fedakârlığı, yurdunun insanlarının dikkatinden kaçmadı. Vedka, hayatını 32. Merov Alayı ve Hür Tacir için vermiş kutsal bir şehit olarak hatırlandı. On yıllar boyunca genç askerlere onun özverili hizmetinin izinden gitmeleri için ilham verdi.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawski'nin fedakârlığı, yurdunun insanlarının dikkatinden kaçmadı. Vedka, hayatını 32. Merov Alayı ve Hür Tacir için vermiş kutsal bir şehit olarak hatırlandı. On yıllar boyunca genç askerlere onun özverili hizmetinin izinden gitmeleri için ilham verdi.

languages.text: Vedka Dunawskis Opfer blieb von den Bewohnern ihrer Heimatwelt nicht unbemerkt. Vedka ging als heilige Märtyrerin in die Geschichte ein, die für das 32. Merov-Regiment und {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} ihr Leben gegeben hatte. Noch Jahrzehnte später inspirierte ihr Beispiel junge Soldaten dazu, in ihre Fußstapfen zu treten und selbstlos zu dienen.
languages.original_text: Vedka Dunawski's sacrifice did not go unnoticed by the people of her homeworld. Vedka was remembered as a holy martyr who had given her life for the 32nd Merov Regiment and the Rogue Trader. For decades afterward, her example inspired young soldiers to follow in her footsteps of selfless service.

traits.locale_text: Vedka Dunawskis Opfer blieb von den Bewohnern ihrer Heimatwelt nicht unbemerkt. Vedka ging als heilige Märtyrerin in die Geschichte ein, die für das 32. Merov-Regiment und {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} ihr Leben gegeben hatte. Noch Jahrzehnte später inspirierte ihr Beispiel junge Soldaten dazu, in ihre Fußstapfen zu treten und selbstlos zu dienen.
